summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 3DKPRINT admin panel. Login, dashboard, product management, and navigation functionality are working well with minor issues identified.

integration_issues.issue: Back button from product detail page may have selector issues causing navigation timeouts

passed_tests: Produtos page loads with product list (15 products found)
Product detail navigation via 'Ver' buttons works (/admin/produtos/:id)
Product detail pages show complete specifications
Sidebar shows main sections: Dashboard, Produtos, Orçamentos, Vendas, Relatórios, Usuários
Novo Produto button is visible and accessible
Edit and Delete buttons are present on product cards

medium_priority_fixes: Add missing 'Produção' section to sidebar navigation in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/Sidebar.tsx
Fix back navigation button selector in product detail page /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminProdutoDetalhe.tsx
minor_improvements: Consider adding loading states for better UX during navigation
Verify 'Novo Produto' modal form validation and submission flow
